title: CorruptionCraft
description: A plugin that challenges players. Random events can occur. (no Spoilers!)
body:
A 1 in 3 dice roll is done every 3 seconds if landed on 2 then one of the following occurs

A random potion effect is applied to a random player. Possible effects: LEVITATION SPEED INVISIBILITY POISON REGENERATION STRENGTH RESISTANCE BLINDNESS

Kill Random Player 
A random player is selected and their health is set to 0, effectively "killing" them. 

Give Random Items 
A random player is given a random item (from the Minecraft item list), with 100 items of that type. 

Spawn Random Zombies
A random player is chosen, and between 1 and 100 zombies are spawned at their location.

Strike Lightning 
Lightning strikes the location of a random player. 

Swap Random Inventories 
Two random players are selected, and their inventories are swapped. 

Fill TNT and Light It A random player's location is chosen, and a TNT structure is filled in a 100x100x100 block area (spanning 100 blocks up, 100 in the x-direction, and 100 in the z-direction). The TNT is then lit with lightning. 

Teleport Random Player 
A random player is teleported to another random player's location. 

Clear Random Inventory 
A random player's inventory is completely cleared. 

Change Random Weather 
A random player's world weather is changed to either clear or rain. 

Random Player Name 
Change A random player's name is temporarily changed to a random 8-letter string for 1 minute. After the time expires, their name is reverted.

Creeper Drop
A creeper with fuse 0 (instant explosion) is dropped on a random player

Wither Spawn
Wither is spawned

Ender Dragon
Ender Dragon Is Spawned

Fall from 100 blocks
teleports player 100 blocks into air

**Support Me: ko-fi.com/slrrxx**
